el.botd.simulationCtaDesc: See exactly what the daily Pick of the Day stream would have returned at your own stake, using the actual pre-match odds stored for each pick. Opens the full calculator scoped to Bet of the Day only.
el.botd.simulationCtaTitle: Simulate your Bet of the Day returns
el.results.noBacktestHint: Our live results feed only keeps the last 30 days, and the backtest regime ended on 16 April 2026. Switch to Live to see picks logged since launch.
el.results.noBacktestTitle: No backtest picks in this window
el.results.roiCalcAvgOddsTooltip: Average bookmaker odds paid across the picks in this window. Lower odds (e.g. 1.30) mean the pick was a heavy favourite — you win less per correct bet, so you need a higher win rate to come out ahead.
el.results.roiCalcBreakEvenTooltip: The win rate you need to hit — given the average odds — just to not lose money. If your actual win rate is below this number, the simulator will be in the red even if accuracy looks healthy.
el.results.roiCalcDisclaimer: Return calculated with the actual pre-match 1X2 odds stored for each fixture. Flat stake, one unit per pick, no compounding. Educational simulation — not financial or betting advice.
el.results.roiCalcEstimatedNote: Note: {count} of {total} picks had no odds on file and use a flat 1.90 fallback.
el.results.roiCalcIntro: Follow the four steps to see what our live picks would have returned at your own stake. Simulation runs against strict pre-match odds from 16 April 2026 onwards.
el.results.roiCalcModelNote: Note: {count} of {total} picks had no bookmaker odds on file — fair odds were derived from the model probability (1 / prob).
el.results.roiCalcSmallSampleHint: Only {n} graded picks so far. Early streaks are noisy — even with a strong long-term model, a short run of losses can easily drop you below break-even. Wait for at least 30 picks before drawing conclusions about the model.
el.results.roiCalcSrcAllHint: Everything combined — good for volume, mixes two different data regimes.
el.results.roiCalcSrcBacktestHint: Model validation on historical data — no wagering against closing odds.
el.results.roiCalcSrcLiveHint: Strict pre-match picks logged since 16 April 2026. Matches the live track record.
el.results.roiCalcStep1Hint: Which tier of picks do you want to include?
el.results.roiCalcStep1LockedHint: Bet of the Day is always Gold tier — scope is locked.
el.results.roiCalcStep2Hint: How much would you have wagered on each pick?
el.results.roiCalcStep3Hint: How far back should we look? Pick a preset or type any number of days.
el.results.roiCalcStep4Hint: What you would have won or lost with these settings.
el.results.roiCalcStepSourceHint: Live = strict pre-match picks since 16 Apr 2026 (matches the track record). Backtest = historical model validation. All = both combined.
el.tier.badge: Three tiers, one honest track record
el.tier.lede: Every prediction is labelled with a tier based on model confidence. The higher the tier, the stricter the threshold and the sharper the numbers.
el.tier.liveNote: Live numbers, straight from our database.
el.trackRecord.signInLockedLede: Free Access gets you into the dashboard — no card, no billing. Inside you unlock the full live track record, CSV / JSON export on every prediction, and per-match detail on every call we've ever made.
el.trackRecord.signInLockedTitle: Want CSV exports and every detail per pick?

sw.botd.liveTracking.lede: The Pick of the Day, but only when it was locked before kickoff by the live scheduler and graded afterwards. No backtest, no retroactive rows. This measurement starts small and grows every day a BOTD fixture is played.
sw.botd.liveTracking.sectionLabel: 4 · Pick of the Day — live measurement
sw.botd.simulationCtaDesc: See exactly what the daily Pick of the Day stream would have returned at your own stake, using the actual pre-match odds stored for each pick. Opens the full calculator scoped to Bet of the Day only.
sw.botd.simulationCtaTitle: Simulate your Bet of the Day returns
sw.botd.trackRecord.footnote: Pick of the Day is a feature for Gold and Platinum subscribers — these numbers show how the feature would have performed historically. In production each pick is timestamped and locked before kick-off.
sw.botd.trackRecord.lede: Our BOTD method (the highest-confidence pick per day) applied to matches that have since finished. This is backtest data — an honest proxy for how the feature would have performed historically. The strict pre-match live version lives in section 4 below.
sw.botd.trackRecord.methodConfidenceBody: Our v8.1 engine (XGBoost + calibrated logistic) ranks every match for a day. The pick with the highest probability in a Gold-tier league wins.
sw.botd.trackRecord.methodGradedBody: Once the result arrives each pick is labelled ✅ or ❌. The numbers above are a simple tally: correct / evaluated.
sw.botd.trackRecord.methodLockedBody: Each pick is one row in the database with a timestamp before kickoff. Point-in-time features (Elo, form, H2H, standings) — never post-hoc data.
sw.botd.trackRecord.sectionLabel: 3 · Pick of the Day — historical backtest
sw.botd.trackRecord.tableRawDataNote: Raw data behind the KPIs above. Scroll to see everything.
sw.botd.trackRecord.titleLine1: The daily best pick, replayed on
sw.botd.trackRecord.verifyBody: The CSV contains every pick counted in the four KPIs above — with date, match, league, pick, confidence, score and outcome. Feel free to recompute the accuracy yourself in Excel or Sheets.
sw.botd.trackRecord.verifyTitle: Want to verify the full dataset yourself?
